title: Dashboard
connectStravaDesc: Sync your activities to see your training metrics and performance data.
connectGarminTitle: Connect Garmin for Sleep & Wellness Data
connectGarminDesc: Track your sleep quality, training readiness, and more.
trainingReadinessHint: Garmin's metric blending sleep, recovery, HRV, load and stress. It is just one of the inputs to CyclingForge readiness.
trPrime: Prime readiness – an ideal day for a hard, key workout.
trReady: Good readiness – you can take on your planned workout.
trModerate: Moderate readiness – keep the intensity moderate today.
trLow: Low readiness – consider an easy session or rest.
restDayRecommended: Rest day recommended - take it easy!
considerLightWalk: Consider a light walk or stretching today.
loadRisingQuickly: Load is rising quickly – pay attention to recovery.
connectStravaToStart: Connect your Strava account to start tracking your training.
connectStravaToSync: Connect your Strava account to sync your activities.
syncToSeeActivities: Sync with Strava to see your recent rides and runs.
